name: DaeWes Credit Solutions
description_short: DaeWes Credit Solutions disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and provides credit education to help consumers nationwide improve their financial position.
description_long:
DaeWes Credit Solutions was founded in 2012 by Daemon Wesley as a financial services company and has since evolved to focus primarily on credit repair, financial literacy, and credit education. The company operates nationwide from a Philadelphia, PA base and is led by Wesley, who holds an accounting degree and brings 20+ years of experience in corporate financial analysis, strategic planning, and business development. Wesley is an established speaker and educator, having conducted workshops with organizations including the Enterprise Center, the Free Library of Philadelphia, and the AARP Foundation.

The company's core service involves identifying and disputing inaccurate, incomplete, and unverifiable items on credit reports with the goal of raising credit scores through deletions and corrections. Beyond dispute services, DaeWes offers financial consulting, credit counseling, and educational workshops designed to help clients understand credit mechanics and avoid future financial pitfalls. They assist with both personal credit repair and EIN-based business credit improvement.

DaeWes distinguishes itself through its founder's deep community involvement—Wesley serves as a Presbyterian Church Elder, Eagle Scout, and frequent speaker at nonprofits and community organizations. The company emphasizes education alongside repair work, positioning itself as focused on long-term financial health rather than quick fixes. Customer testimonials on Alignable highlight honesty, professionalism, and personalized attention throughout the repair process.

As a credit repair company, DaeWes operates in a regulated space and makes standard claims about credit score improvement through dispute resolution. The website does not disclose specific pricing, timelines, success rates, or legal disclaimers about credit repair limitations. Consumers should verify the company's regulatory standing and understand that credit repair results depend entirely on whether disputed items are verifiable—not all negative items can be removed, and the process typically takes months.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Founder has 20+ years of financial services experience with accounting degree and corporate background
Offers integrated approach combining credit repair with financial education and credit counseling
Founder actively conducts free workshops and education with nonprofits including AARP Foundation and Free Library of Philadelphia
Addresses both personal credit and EIN-based business credit repair
6 recommendations on Alignable with specific praise for honesty and personalized client support
Explicitly addresses impact of credit on employment, insurance, housing, and utility decisions—showing broader financial literacy focus
Founded in 2012 (established company, not newly formed)
cons: Website does not disclose pricing structure or service fees
No specific information about average timeline for dispute resolution or success rates
Limited detail about dispute methodology or legal compliance framework
No clear disclaimer about limitations of credit repair (i.e., that legitimate negative items cannot be removed)
Small sample size of Alignable reviews (only 6 recommendations) limits verifiable third-party feedback
best_for: Consumers with inaccurate or unverifiable negative items on their credit reports seeking dispute assistance
Small business owners looking to establish or repair business credit via EIN
Individuals seeking integrated credit repair plus financial education and ongoing counseling
diagnosis: DaeWes Credit Solutions is best for consumers with documented inaccurate or unverifiable items on their credit reports who value an educational approach alongside dispute work. The main caveat is that no pricing, timelines, or success metrics are disclosed on the website, so prospective clients must contact the company directly to evaluate cost-effectiveness versus competitors.
services: Credit score improvement through item deletion/correction
Consulting services for small business and nonprofits
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
